packageRules.description: tsgo / TypeScript 7 native preview. Tracks the latest dist-tag (Microsoft's curated channel with up-to-date Go-stdlib CVE fixes). tsgo emits the browser JS bundle at build time, so every bump needs a rebuild. CLEANUP WHEN TS 7 IS STABLE: drop followTag + ignoreUnstable, restore default release cadence.

transformTemplates: { "releases": versions.{ "version": version, "digest": packages[fileType = 'zip' and targetTriple = 'x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu' and variant = 'headless'][0].sha256 } }

customManagers.description: kiro-cli version + sha256 pinned in entrypoint.sh
